+++ head/security/bsmtrace/Makefile	Sun Feb  9 20:29:37 2014	(r343540)
@@ -2,8 +2,8 @@

 PORTNAME=	bsmtrace
-PORTVERSION=	1.3

--CC	= gcc
--CFLAGS 	= -Wall -g
-+CC	?= gcc

++++ Makefile	2014-02-09 10:44:49.000000000 -0600
+@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
  TARGETS = bsmtrace
- OBJ	= bsm.o bsmtrace.o conf.o y.tab.o lex.yy.o log.o pipe.o trigger.o fcache.o

 +LIBS	+= -lbsm
